name: cursor-delegate
description: Delegate self-contained coding/research tasks to the Cursor CLI (cursor-agent) from inside Claude Code, so they run on the Cursor subscription's quota instead of Claude's. One task via the cursor-delegate skill, or a whole fleet via cursor-orchestrate (Claude plans and reviews, Cursor executes in parallel). Long tasks run legged: ~4-minute legs resumed on one session, so flaky networks/VPNs cannot kill the stream. Works with your single Cursor login out of the box; an optional account input targets a specific seat. Agent calling, not a model-backend swap.
